national_summary: Red alerts are active across Andhra Pradesh, Chhattisgarh, Uttar Pradesh. Orange alerts are active across Andhra Pradesh, Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Karnataka, Kerala, Maharashtra, Odisha, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal. Major weather events include Hailstorm, Dust Raising winds, and Lightning, Hailstorm, Gusty winds, and Thunder shower, Heat Wave, Heavy Rain, Lightning, Lightning, Hailstorm, Gusty winds, and Thunder shower, Moderate Thunderstorms, Moderate Thunderstorms with surface wind, Severe Thunderstorms with surface wind, Thunder shower with strong wind, Thunderstorm, Thunderstorm with Lightning, Thunderstorms with Hail. Please follow official SDMA advisories.
